_comment: Example MCP server configuration required by vladyslav-skills. Copy the `mcpServers.mempalace` block into your `~/.claude.json` (user scope) and adjust the interpreter + palace path to your local install. This file is reference only — Claude Code does not auto-load it. See docs/operations/dependencies.md for install/update + interpreter-pinning notes.

mempalace._comment: Long-term cross-session memory. Python package `mempalace` (pip install mempalace). Required by 9 skills: add-feature, fix-bug, discover, discover-apple-check, design-sync, ingest, pre-release-check, compact-save, save. IMPORTANT: set `command` to the ABSOLUTE path of the interpreter where mempalace is installed (not bare `python3`), so the MCP server launches against the right Python.
